calendar.matters:
Compromise Of Person With A Disability In Scd.
Off Calendar Aug-05-2005 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: This cause came on regularly as scheduled for Compromise of a Person With Disability hearing this day.
Dept. 218, Comm. Sue Kaplan, Clerk: S. Ravinantapricha, CSR: Gena Eales.
Richard Brody, Esq. and Maureen McGoven, Esq. for Petitioner: Louise Smith as Guardian ad litem for Disable Person: Richard Wendal Smith.
On the basis of evidence received, the Petition is granted and compromise of $10,000.00 is approved.
No fees or costs.
Counsel to prepare Order.

Aug. 5, 2005
Order granted and signed by Comm. Kaplan, see scanned doc. for details of Order.
